limitations: No verified packaged engine was available, so actual full or verification-only engine execution is not qualified; those modes are covered by deterministic contract scenarios.
The local development marketplace is not an immutable Git-backed release snapshot and supplies no public support claim.
The bundled baseline is an offline projection of DEC-0017, not a signed policy pack or conformance evidence.
Only Codex CLI routing was exercised live; desktop and IDE remain needs-review, while web/chat/mobile local lifecycle operation is unsupported.
Native CI evidence is pending for this branch and the aggregate qualification state remains needs-review until it passes.
No dedicated assistive-technology evaluation has been performed for the CLI and Markdown interaction path.
